name: sync mechanism dry-run mode prints planned sync operations without invoking fetchers
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && printf 'sources: [{id: a, source_class: financial-industry, tier: 1, applies_to: [node]}]\noperator_namespace: []\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/PR-SOURCES.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/sync-from-sources.sh" --registry .claude-tdd-pro/PR-SOURCES.yaml --dry-run 2>out.txt && grep -q 'planned: a' out.txt && grep -q 'invoked=false' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
